name: icsprout55
description: A non-Ciel, on-disk open PDK (open-ecos icsprout55) — shown deliberately in BRING-UP state: only the technology LEF is presented today, so there are no corners[] or cell_libraries[] yet. Demonstrates two things: (1) a PDK with a completely different layout (prtech/ + IP/) than the Ciel sky130 tree still maps onto the same keys; (2) the descriptor describes WHAT EXISTS — a resolver errors only when a flow needs collateral that isn't presented yet. cell_libraries[] / corners[] are added as the icsprout55 std-cell .lib + SPICE collateral grows. Mirrored under github.com/vyges-tools.
